Title: Thailand ANZAC Tour - 20th April - 2nd May 2024
Description: We open the Tour with 2 rounds of golf & a Bangkok Highlights & Canal Tour, before transferring to Kanchanaburi to spend ANZAC Day at key sites firmly entrenched in Australia’s history. Opening the day with the Dawn Service at HellFire Pass, we’ll also visit the Jeath War Museum before embarking on the infamous Burma Railroad culminating at the famous Bridge on the River Kwai. A round of golf at the spectacular Grand Prix Golf Club rounds out the first week with the option to extend your tour to experience the delights of Hua Hin.

One of our favourites. 12 days / 11 nights of paradise including 7 rounds of golf on some of Asia’s best courses & staying at the wonderful 4 star The Kee Resort & Spa, you’ll be based right amongst the action at Patong Beach.

Title: Best of The Phillipines, Sept 2025
Description:
Embark on a 8-day golf holiday that captures the essence of the Philippines' premier courses. Your journey begins at Sherwood Hills Golf Club, (said to be Jack Nicklaus’ favourite course design), followed by Eagle Ridge which is the largest golfing facility in the country. Travel to Clark to experience the sublime redesign at Mimosa Plus, and conclude at the elite Luisita Golf Club giving you the perfect blend of luxury, adventure, and relaxation. *(pricing based on minimum of 8 Golfers with optional extensions available).

Title: Phuket Paradise: 13-Day Golf & Luxury Getaway - Limited spots remaining!
